ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "handicap" REAL /* Player's handicap */,
  "turned_pro" TEXT /* Date the player turned professional */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tours" (
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tour */,
  "tour_name" TEXT /* Name of the tour */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tour */,
  "website" TEXT /* Tour website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tour the tournament belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "course_length" REAL /* Length of the course in yards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the event belongs to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "tee_time" TEXT /* Tee time for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournaments" (
  "player_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-tournament combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament for the player */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament for the player */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_events" (
  "player_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-event combination */,
  "player_tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-tournament combination */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player in the event */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par for the event */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the player in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_events_player_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_tournament_id") REFERENCES player_tournaments ("player_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings" (
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earning */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the earning */,
  "official_money_won" REAL /* Official money won by the player */,
  "potential_money" REAL /* Potential money the player could have won */,
  "tax_deductions" REAL /* Tax deductions from the earnings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player */,
  "events" INTEGER /* Number of events the player participated in */,
  "pct_total_money_won" REAL /* Percentage of total money won by the player */,
  "points" REAL /* Points earned by the player in the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of the statistic (e.g., average, total, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournament_stats" (
  "player_tournament_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-tournament statistic */,
  "player_tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-tournament combination */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_tournament_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_stats_player_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_tournament_id") REFERENCES player_tournaments ("player_tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_event_stats" (
  "player_event_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-event statistic */,
  "player_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-event combination */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_event_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_event_stats_player_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_event_id") REFERENCES player_events ("player_event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the sponsorship contract */,
  "contract_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the sponsorship contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the coach (e.g., swing coach, mental coach) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the trainer (e.g., fitness trainer, nutritionist) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, player) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
